name: Blasteroids
short_description: Blast your way through waves of space debris in order to reach what is waiting for you on the other side. Find your fighting style with multiple unlockable ships in this fast paced space adventure!
detailed_description:
This game provides a unique twist to a traditional 2D space shooter game. With 4 unique ships, you can choose your own way to blast through the levels, and hopefully reach the end of this space adventure.

Each ship provides a unique set of weapons and controls, each with their own strengths and weaknesses.

Start out with a basic ship provided to all space explorers, and blast your way to the very top in order to take your chance at beating the scores of any competitor, even including the devs.
